# 416 Jet Skis

> Toronto jet ski rentals on Lake Ontario. Locally owned Sea-Doo fleet with safety briefing included on every ride.

## Business

- Name: 416 Jet Skis
- Service: Personal watercraft (jet ski / Sea-Doo) rentals
- Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada — Lake Ontario & GTA public boat launches
- Phone: 416-305-5187
- Email: 416jetskis@gmail.com
- Website: https://416-jet-skis.vercel.app
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/416jetskis/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@416.jet.ski.renta

## Fleet

- 2026 Sea-Doo GTI SE 130
- 2026 Sea-Doo GTI SE 170
- 2026 Sea-Doo GTR 230
- 2026 Sea-Doo RXP-X 300
- Built-in speakers on all models

## Pricing (CAD)

Weekdays: $130/hr · $375/4hr · $550/8hr
Weekends: $150/hr · $450/4hr · $650/8hr
Longer rentals (12hr, daily, multi-day, weekly, monthly): contact directly — not available on the online calendar.

## Booking

- Hourly rentals (1hr, 2hr, 4hr, 8hr): book online at /book or /#book
- Full-day, weekend, multi-day: call 416-305-5187 or email 416jetskis@gmail.com

## Requirements

- Drivers: 18+ with valid photo ID and G2 or G driver's licence
- PCOC (boating licence): orientation provided — issued after safety briefing
- PFDs (life jackets) included and required at all times
- Under-18 passengers allowed with guardian + signed waiver

## Safety

- Zero tolerance for alcohol or drugs on the water
- Obey speed limits, no-wake zones, stay 30m from swimmers
- Weather cancellations for safety — rescheduling offered
- Refundable deposit required at booking

## Key pages

- Home & booking: /
- Pricing: /pricing
- FAQ: /faq
- Safety rules: /safety
- Gallery: /gallery
- About: /about
- Contact: /contact
- Book online: /book
